before_internal_prototype.implementation: initial unoptimized research prototype on same synthetic workload

after_optimized.environment: local synthetic benchmark; no broker/API/network calls
algorithm_optimizations: one shared Ledoit-Wolf covariance fit per parent run
after_optimized.limitations: Does not measure the production Quick Run with live Twelve Data/Finnhub/MT5. It measures the new lazy research layer and cache behavior only.

production_quick_run_measurement: NOT MEASURED: live Twelve Data/Finnhub/MT5 credentials and broker session were not available in this environment.
interpretation: The new research layer adds zero execution cost while Field 10 is closed because it is not called. First opening computes missing saved generations; subsequent reopening uses SQLite cache.
